name: automation
description:
Automation builder plugin

Aliases: @automation, automation, scheduler.

Use this plugin when the user wants to create, inspect, update, or explain Codex automations. It packages a reusable workflow for turning plain-English requests into a concrete automation spec with schedule, prompt, execution mode, workspace, and validation steps.

interface.longDescription: Turn plain-English requests into Codex automation definitions, inspect existing automations, and standardize schedule and prompt structure for recurring work.
defaultPrompt: Create a daily automation at 9:30 AM for this project.
Inspect my existing automation and explain how it runs.
Update an automation to run in the evening too.
